CustomField.description: Indicates Amount Applied to invoice in ledger currency.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled_Checkbox__c), leaseworks__Remaining_Payment_Amount__c, IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c), NULL, IF( leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c = 0, 0, leaseworks__Remaining_Payment_Amount__c * leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates Amount Applied to invoice in ledger currency.
CustomField.label: Amount Applied to Invoice (Ledger)
